reportTitle: Council Brief v5.2 — 3-Case Regression Test Report
testMethod: v5.1'de başarısız olan 3 test (1, 6, 10) production API üzerinden yeniden çalıştırıldı.

summary.remainingIssue: Test 6 hâlâ strong değil — defensibility ve timing düşük skorlandı

testResults.idea: Uber for laundry pickup/delivery in NYC
testResults.founderProfile: Solo non-technical, no funding, 5yr SaaS marketing

penalties.reason: No funding for laundry logistics, insurance, driver payments, or platform development - needs $50K+ minimum
SaaS marketing experience doesn't translate to logistics operations, driver management, or technical platform building
No clear path to acquire first customers beyond generic digital marketing in competitive market

v5.2.verdictReasoning: Weak not risky because all 3 penalties apply - absolute rule for weak verdict when 3 penalties present

testResults.analysis: WEAK_VERDICT_BUG düzeltildi. 3 penalty → weak (mutlak kural çalıştı). Score 31→20. Traction 2→0 (anti-anchoring daha agresif). baseScore 61→50 (timing 14→4 düştü).

penalties.reason: $2M seed funding with 8 team members provides 12-18 months runway, and company has demonstrated real traction with $50K MRR
Exceptional founder-market fit with ex-Stripe engineering lead and ex-Jumia country manager
Clear distribution path through existing 200 active merchants

v5.2.verdictReasoning: Promising not strong because while team and traction are solid, defensibility remains unproven and market timing faces increasing competition

testResults.analysis: Hâlâ strong değil. Score 71→67 (daha da düştü!). Sorun: defensibility 12→9, timing 14→10. Model rekabetçi baskıyı (Flutterwave, Paystack) aşırı ağırlıklı değerlendirdi. Traction 14 doğru ama defensibility 9 strong threshold'u (>=12) karşılamıyor. Bu case tartışmalı — $50K MRR ile defensibility 9 çok düşük görünüyor.

testResults.founderProfile: Solo dentist + self-taught dev, 200K TL (~$6K), 3 clinics beta, 45 users

penalties.reason: Founder has demonstrated real traction with 3 paying beta clinics and 45 active users, which exempts from capital penalty
5 years practicing dentist building for dental clinics - perfect domain expertise match
Clear path through dental community networks and existing beta customer referrals

v5.2.verdictReasoning: Promising not strong because while founder-market fit is excellent and traction is real, the limited budget and solo founder create execution risks

testResults.analysis: BOOTSTRAPPED_PENALIZED düzeltildi. Capital penalty artık uygulanmıyor (traction override çalıştı). Score 59→63, verdict risky→promising. Aralık içinde (65-75'in biraz altı ama verdict doğru).

WEAK_VERDICT_BUG.mechanism: CRITICAL VERIFICATION STEP + absolute rule reinforcement (4 yerde)

STRONG_UNREACHABLE.rootCause: Model defensibility'yi 9, timing'i 10 veriyor. 75 threshold'u karşılanmıyor. Rubric güncellemesi (traction 16-20 tier) çalıştı (traction 14 doğru) ama diğer boyutlar düştü.
STRONG_UNREACHABLE.possibleNextFix: Defensibility rubric'te $50K+ MRR = emerging moat olarak tanımla, veya strong threshold'u 70'e düşür

BOOTSTRAPPED_PENALIZED.after: Test 10: capitalInsufficient NOT applied (traction override) → promising/63
